supported_devices: EC inline fans, exhaust fans, LED grow lights, humidifiers, heaters, air conditioners, third-party outlet devices via UIS Control Plug adapter
port_types: UIS (x8), 3.5mm probe (3 sensor slots: 1 built-in + corded probe + 1 expansion)
ai_notes: AI observes environment patterns, anticipates climate spikes, and adjusts device output to exact percentages using adaptive algorithms (manufacturer describes as machine learning; independent reviews suggest PID-based adaptive control). Beginner mode provides fully automated grow management; Advanced mode enables manual tuning. In-app chatbot for grow questions. AI light schedule optimization automatically shifts lights to cooler periods. CO2 management requires optional CO2+Light sensor (sold separately). App provides performance scores and recommendations.
compatible_ec_fans: CLOUDLINE T-series, AIRLIFT, CLOUDLIFT, CLOUDWAY, CLOUDRAY
compatible_lights: IONBEAM LED bars, IONBOARD LED boards
compatible_sensors: AC Infinity temp/humidity probe (included), CO2+Light sensor (optional), soil moisture sensor (optional), water detection sensor (optional)
compatible_co2_equipment: any via UIS Control Plug adapter; CO2 PPM-based fan control with optional CO2+Light sensor
supported_manufacturer_series: CLOUDLINE, AIRLIFT, CLOUDLIFT, CLOUDWAY, CLOUDRAY, CLOUDFORGE, IONBEAM, IONBOARD
recommended_use_note: AI-powered flagship controller for automated grow room management; expandable to 32 UIS devices with hub splitters; dual-zone monitoring; best choice for hands-off climate automation
notes: Model CTR89Q. 4.5-inch capacitive touch display. Dual-zone temperature/humidity/VPD monitoring (built-in sensor + corded probe). Supports 3 total sensor slots; CO2 and soil sensors sold separately. Dehumidifier control requires UIS Control Plug adapter. control_co2 only active with optional CO2+Light sensor.
